Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 3, 098 [Šumma Alu Excerpt][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana IGI DINGIR [...]

(o 1) (If) a man, when prostrating in front of a god [...].

o 22

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana IGI DINGIR x [...]

(o 2) (If) a man, when prostrating in front of a god [...].

o 33

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana IGI DINGIR ik-⸢ri-bi⸣ [...]

(o 3) (If) a man, when prostrating in front of a god, a prayer [...].

o 44

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana ZA₃-šu₂ uš-kin [...]

(o 4) (If) a man, when prostrating, prostrates on his right [...].

o 55

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana GUB₃-šu₂ uš-kin [...]  ; [x] x

(o 5) (If) a man, when prostrating, prostrates on his left [...].

o 66

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana ti-ri-iṣ pa-ni-šu₂ uš-kin [...]

(o 6) (If) a man, when prostrating, prostrates in front of him [...].

o 77

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana ZA₃ u GUB₃ MIN [...] NI [...]

(o 7) (If) a man, when prostrating, [...] alternatively on the right and on the left: the god will be agreeable to his prayer and supplication; life [...].

o 88

ik-ri-bi-šu₂ u su-pu-šu₂ DINGIR ma-gir TI ⸢U₄⸣ [...]

o 99

* LU₂ ina KI.ZA.ZA-šu ana IGI DINGIR A₂-šu₂ ik-⸢si?⸣ LU₂ ⸢BI⸣ [...]

(o 9) (If) a man, when prostrating in front of the god, binds his arms: that man [...].

o 1010

* LU₂ ana E₂ DINGIR ina a-la-ki-šu₂ ina GE₆ tu₂-ḫa ub-⸢lam⸣ [...]

(o 10) (If) a man, when going to the god's temple during the night, brings some bran [...]

o 1111

* LU₂ ana E₂ DINGIR ŠA₃-šu₂ a-la-ku la ma-gir [...] ŠU [...]

(o 11) (If) a man is not willing to go inside the god's temple [...].

o 1212

* LU₂ ana E₂ DINGIR ŠA₃-šu₂ a-la-ku ⸢ŠA₃⸣ x x x x ŠU? [...]

(o 12) (If) a man [...] to go inside the god's temple [...]

o 1313

* ⸢LU₂⸣ <ina> šu₂-⸢ke!-ni⸣-šu₂ ŠU-MIN-šu₂ ana i-tuk?-U x [x] ⸢LU₂⸣ BI [...]

(o 13) (If) a man when prostrating, his hand to [...]: that man [...].

o 1414

* <LU₂> ana E₂ DINGIR ⸢a⸣-la-ku iq-bi-ma la DUik ⸢NA⸣ [...] ana MUNUS.⸢SIG₅⸣ [...]

(o 14) (If) a man says (he will) go to the god's temple, but does not go: [that] man [...] for good fortune.

Reverse
r 1r 1

* LU₂ ana E₂ DINGIR a-la-ku iq-bi-ma DU⸢ik⸣ [...]  ; ana IGI [...]

(r 1) (If) a man says (he will) go to the god's temple, but does not go: [...] in front of [...].

r 22

* LU₂ ana E₂ DINGIR-šu₂ ana E₂ diš-tar-šu₂ ana E₂ DINGIR x [...]

(r 2) (If) a man [...] to the temple of his (personal) god, to the temple ofhis (personal) goddess, to the temple of the god ...: his (personal) god will grant mercy to that man; his (personal) god will joyfully [...].

r 33

LU₂ BI DINGIR-šu₂ ARḪUŠ GAR-šu₂ DINGIR-šu₂ ḫa-di-iš [...]

Single ruling
(colophon)
r 44

TA DUB.GAL za-mar a-na IGI.DU₈.A [...]

(r 4) From a big tablet; [...] immediately for the viewing [...].

r 55

imGI₃.DA mdEN—URU.UL.LA KA.KEŠDA [...]

(r 5) Oblong tablet of Bel-Urulla; section [...].
